The Revenue Blueprint This isn't a PDF full of theories. Our professional Shopify audit delivers a complete Shopify store improvement plan with clickable prototypes that show you the before and after. We rebuild key pages, test new flows, and map out a data-driven Shopify audit tailored to your store's biggest conversion gaps.

Launch & Optimize We implement the changes, monitor performance, and refine as needed. Our Shopify growth audit doesn't stop at recommendations, we track CRO, AOV, and CLV improvements until you see real, measurable revenue growth.

Checkout friction draining your AOV? Problem 2: Traffic converting like it's 2015? Problem 3: One-time buyers ghosting your brand (CLV not so good)? The average Shopify store converts at 1-2%. Yours doesn t have to settle for average. Our Shopify conversion audit identifies the hidden leaks costing you thousands every month -confusing product pages, broken mobile experiences, checkout steps that kill urgency. We ve helped DTC brands double revenue by fixing issues most store owners don t even know exist. A professional Shopify audit finds them. Fast. 700+ Stores Built $900M+ Revenue Generated 8+ Years of Experience 10+ Awards For Ecomm Wizards What’s included in the Audit Behavioral Analytics That Tell the Truth We track real user behavior: heat maps, scroll depth, session replays, so our data-driven Shopify audit is built on what customers actually do, not what you think they do.
Every change we recommend comes with the numbers to prove it. Our Shopify conversion audit ties every UX/UI tweak directly to CRO, AOV, and CLV improvements, so you know exactly what drives revenue.
No vague mockups. Our professional Shopify audit includes interactive Figma prototypes you can click through, test with your team, and hand off to developers the same day. Zero guesswork.

We audit every critical touchpoint—homepage, collections, product pages, cart, checkout, and account pages. Our Shopify store improvement plan covers the entire customer journey, not just the homepage.

We don't give you vague suggestions. Our data-driven Shopify audit includes before/after projections for CRO, AOV, and CLV so you know exactly what success looks like before you implement a single change.
We only recommend changes that move revenue. Our professional Shopify audit prioritizes the highest-impact fixes first – the ones proven to generate up to 5x returns in the first 30 days.
This isn't a "here's your report, good luck" situation. Our Shopify experts walk you through every recommendation, answer technical questions, and help your team execute flawlessly.
Just admin access to your Shopify store. If you don't have heatmapping or analytics tools installed, our Shopify experts will set them up as part of your data-driven Shopify audit.
3-5 business days. We deliver your complete Shopify conversion audit with prototypes, recommendations, and a 30-minute strategy session—faster than most agencies take to schedule a kickoff call.
100% money-back guarantee. If our professional Shopify audit doesn't uncover actionable revenue opportunities, we refund every dollar.Just email us for the refund. No Questions asked.
Absolutely. Our single-page Shopify store audit lets you test our process on your biggest bottleneck first. Once you see the results, scaling to the full-funnel audit is easy.

Claim Your Audit (Risk-Free) Ecomm Wizards is the Platinum Partner on Shopify Globally Brook Sanderson Merchant Success Director Jake Amos Co-Founder Truc Peter Senior Account Executive Giana Moretti Senior eCommerce Manager Anthony Spallone Co-Founder Maddie Schwartz Senior Account Executive Julia Matviichuk eCommerce Manager Sofia Jimenez eCommerce Manager Caroline Jay eCommerce Manager A Note From Our Founder I ll be honest with you.

The ecommerce game is evolving faster than most Shopify stores can keep up. AI isn t coming – it s already here, reshaping how customers discover products, make purchases, and what they expect from the brands they trust.

I started Ecomm Wizards because I watched too many talented DTC brands fall behind. Not because they lacked great products – but because they partnered with a Shopify development agency that couldn t adapt to where the industry was headed.

Our ecommerce agency is built differently. We combine conversion expertise with cutting-edge technology to make sure your store doesn t just survive – it dominates. Whether you need a professional Shopify audit, a complete store rebuild, Shopify marketing stack, or a Shopify web development agency that actually understands your growth goals, we ve got you covered.
So here s my commitment: if you partner with our Shopify experts, you won t just keep up – you ll lead. We ll make sure of it.
The future belongs to brands that move now. Let s make sure you re one of them.
lis: Deep-dive analysis of your chosen page (Homepage, Product, Collection, Cart – you decide).
